# job-monitor

> Automated job monitoring across LinkedIn, Indeed, USAJobs, and Google Jobs.

## What it does

Searches 4 job boards via Apify actors, deduplicates results across sources
using normalized title+company keys, stores new postings in SQLite, and
optionally sends email digests of new jobs. Runs on GitHub Actions cron for
free, zero ongoing maintenance.

## How to use it

CLI: job-monitor run --config config.yml
CLI (dry run): job-monitor run --config config.yml --dry-run
CLI (search only): job-monitor search --query "Software Engineer" --location "SF Bay Area" --source linkedin
MCP: job-monitor mcp (stdio MCP server for AI agents)
Python: from job_monitor.pipeline import run

## Key concepts

- Config-driven: YAML files define search queries, locations, filters, and notifications
- 3-layer dedup: cross-source title+company matching, database check, company proximity
- Composable: search | dedup | store | notify can be piped independently via JSON stdin/stdout
- Agent-friendly: non-interactive, --output json, fail-fast errors with corrective examples
- Storage: SQLite by default (zero config), Supabase optional for cloud

## Requirements

- Python 3.10+
- APIFY_API_TOKEN (free tier available at https://console.apify.com)
- Optional: RESEND_API_KEY for email, Google OAuth for Sheets, PROSPEO_API_KEY for enrichment
